name: Pilot Travel Center #222
description: Major truck stop at the I-90/I-84 interchange (I-90 Exit 78 / I-84 Exit 1) serving the Mass Pike Sturbridge area, with about 125 truck parking spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 6 showers, a CAT Scale and bulk DEF.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Sturbridge
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Sturbridge Pilot Travel Center near the I-90/I-84 junction.

name: New England Truck Stop
description: Independent truck stop near the Sturbridge Mass Pike interchange with about 35 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, a deli/restaurant, laundromat, lounge, scales and engine/road repair.

name: Charlton Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Mass Pike eastbound service plaza (between Exits 9 and 10) with Gulf fuel, a food court (McDonald's, Papa Gino's, D'Angelo, Fresh City, Auntie Anne's), restrooms and truck parking.

name: Charlton Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Mass Pike westbound service plaza (between Exits 9 and 10) with Gulf fuel (4 fuel lanes), food, restrooms and truck parking; the largest Mass Pike plaza with truck parking.

name: Framingham Service Plaza (Westbound)
description: Mass Pike westbound service plaza with Gulf fuel, McDonald's, a large convenience store, restrooms and truck parking, open 24/7.

name: Natick Service Plaza (Eastbound)
description: Mass Pike eastbound service plaza with Gulf fuel, food (McDonald's, Dunkin, deli), a travel store, restrooms and a small number of truck parking spaces, open 24/7.

name: Commercial Truck Tire Center - Worcester
description: Commercial/OTR truck tire dealer (Bridgestone/Firestone) in Worcester near the I-90/I-290 corridor, with tire sales, service and after-hours emergency road service.

name: Matthews Truck Service & Heavy Duty Towing
description: Heavy-duty truck and trailer repair, towing and recovery, and mobile road service marketed to the Worcester / I-90 area (based in nearby Sterling).

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Sturbridge
description: Budget hotel near the Sturbridge I-90/I-84 interchange listed as offering truck/large-vehicle parking.
